prompt: Generate a cartoon snake shaped like in image 2, but composed entirely of the word 'SNAKE' using the bold curved red lettering and side phrase style from image 1.
prompt_refined: Generate a cartoon snake graphic. The snake should adopt the coiled posture and simplified, friendly character design of the snake in image 2. Its entire form, including the head, body, and tail, must be composed of the word 'SNAKE'. The letters of 'SNAKE' should be rendered in the distinctive bold, rounded, red lettering style of the 'CHERRY' text from image 1, with the letters curving organically to define the snake's shape. Additionally, incorporate a small, vertically arranged phrase, similar to 'don't you call him baby' in image 1, positioned along one side of the snake's body, using the same thin, cursive, dark font.
objects: the word 'SNAKE' forming the snake's entire body (head, body, and tail)
letters of 'SNAKE' organically curving to define the snake's shape
small phrase along one side of the snake's body
thin, cursive, dark font for the phrase
